overview: This fish closely resembles the Spotted Sorubim (Pseudoplatystoma corruscans) or similar species within the Pimelodidae family. It features a spotted pattern on its dorsal surface and long barbels typical of long-whiskered catfishes. The specimen shown is approximately 19 centimeters in length based on the included measurement scale. Search FishBase +2 2 sites Pseudoplatystoma corruscans, Spotted sorubim : fisheries ...
